title: Payment stuck or not completing?
description: Your payment may still be processing, or you experienced an error when attempting to purchase credits.
helperText: Before reporting, confirm whether the payment actually went through and whether the page updated after a short wait.

title: Paid but credits or license did not reflect?
description: Your payment may have completed successfully, but your license key or credits may not have reflected in the extension yet.
helperText: Before reporting, use the Retrieve License Key button in the widget to recover the license and credits linked to your payment.

title: Incorrect answer or poor answer quality?
description: The answer may be incomplete, misleading, or not aligned with your course context.
helperText: Before reporting, upload your notes in the Notes tab and try again.

title: Notes or resources upload problem?
description: Your notes or course resources may not have uploaded, synced, or been used during answer generation as expected.
helperText: Before reporting, retry the upload from the Notes tab and note which file or resource failed and what happened after you tried.
